positive: A hyper-detailed, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a trio of stylized woodland creatures (a fox, an owl, and a deer) silhouetted against a deep indigo sky. The forest floor is comprised of geometric, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and root systems, giving the impression of a magical path. The overall style should be modern folk art mixed with detailed nature etching, using highly saturated jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) punctuated by glowing gold accents. Clean outlines, high contrast, central composition, perfect for seamless apparel printing. Studio lighting, volumetric fog effect, clean vector look, detailed.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, text, watermark, low resolution, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, realistic photo, deep shadows, monochrome, messy, clutter
